Definition: Lampetra planeri genome assembly, chromosome: 15
Description: Lampetra planeri genome assembly, chromosome: 15
Taxonomy_y: Eukaryota; Metazoa; Chordata; Craniata; Vertebrata; Cyclostomata; Hyperoartia; Petromyzontiformes; Petromyzontidae; Lampetra
Assembly: On Oct 10, 2024 this sequence version replaced OZ078338.1.; This project provides the diploid genome assembly kcLamPlan1.2 of the brook lamprey, Lampetra planeri. The sample was provided by Mikael Svensson, and the data generation and assembly were carried out by EBP-Nor (https://www.ebpnor.org/). kcLamPlan1.1 is based on 44x PacBio HiFi data and 120x Arima Hi-C data. The HiFi reads were filtered for adapters using HiFiAdapterFilt, and assembled with hifiasm along with Hi-C data to generate a pair of haplotype-resolved assemblies. K-mers from the two assemblies were used to filter Hi-C reads to create two sets of reads for scaffolding the assemblies (i.e., reads used to scaffold hap1 did not contain k-mers unique to hap2). YaHS was used for scaffolding. FCS-adaptor was used to remove putative adapters, and putative contaminants were removed with FCS-GX. The chromosomes confirmed by Hi-C data are named according to size.

The sample was provided by Eivind Schartum, and the data generation and assembly were carried out by EBP-Nor (https://www.ebpnor.org/). kcLamPlan1.1 is based on 38x PacBio HiFi data and 100x Arima Hi-C data. The HiFi reads were filtered for adapters using HiFiAdapterFilt, and assembled with hifiasm along with Hi-C data to generate a pair of haplotype-resolved assemblies. K-mers from the two assemblies were used to filter Hi-C reads to create two sets of reads for scaffolding the assemblies (i.e., reads used to scaffold hap1 did not contain k-mers unique to hap2). The chromosomes confirmed by Hi-C data are named according to size.

Definition: Lampetra fluviatilis genome assembly, chromosome: 57 >gi|2815004734|emb|OZ078631.2| Lampetra fluviatilis genome assembly, chromosome: 63
Description: Lampetra fluviatilis genome assembly, chromosome: 57
Taxonomy_y: Eukaryota; Metazoa; Chordata; Craniata; Vertebrata; Cyclostomata; Hyperoartia; Petromyzontiformes; Petromyzontidae; Lampetra
Assembly: This project provides the diploid genome assembly kcLamFluv2.1 of the river lamprey, Lampetra fluviatilis. The sample was provided by Eivind Schartum, and the data generation and assembly were carried out by EBP-Nor (https://www.ebpnor.org/). kcLamPlan1.1 is based on 38x PacBio HiFi data and 100x Arima Hi-C data. The HiFi reads were filtered for adapters using HiFiAdapterFilt, and assembled with hifiasm along with Hi-C data to generate a pair of haplotype-resolved assemblies. K-mers from the two assemblies were used to filter Hi-C reads to create two sets of reads for scaffolding the assemblies (i.e., reads used to scaffold hap1 did not contain k-mers unique to hap2). YaHS was used for scaffolding. FCS-adaptor was used to remove putative adapters, and putative contaminants were removed with FCS-GX. The chromosomes confirmed by Hi-C data are named according to size.

Definition: Apaeleticus inimicus genome assembly, chromosome: 3
Description: Apaeleticus inimicus genome assembly, chromosome: 3
Taxonomy_y: Eukaryota; Metazoa; Ecdysozoa; Arthropoda; Hexapoda; Insecta; Pterygota; Neoptera; Endopterygota; Hymenoptera; Apocrita; Ichneumonoidea; Ichneumonidae; Ichneumoninae; Apaeleticus
Assembly: The assembly iyApaInim1.hap1.1 is based on 83x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. Order and orientation of scaffolds is unsure on Chromosome 2 between 17.72-1933Mb.
